items.name: TC_Pet_Portal_027_049 - Verify the Vaccinations tab displays vaccination information and allows download
TC_Pet_Portal_069 - Verify changing communication preference toggles updates the status correctly to Vetspire & Iterable
TC_Pet_Portal_024 - Verify the "Reschedule" button is displayed for appointments more than 48 hours away and allows the appointment to be rescheduled successfully.
TC_Pet_Portal_025 - Verify the "Reschedule" button is not displayed for appointments equal or less than 48 hours away
TC_Pet_Portal_008_009_010 - Verify the "Thrive membership tag","View Pet Profile","Add Pet" button opens the pop-up and allows adding a pet successfully
TC_Pet_Portal_030_052 - Verify the Prescriptions tab displays prescription information
TC_Pet_Portal_028_050 - Verify the Lab Results tab displays lab results and allows download
TC_Pet_Portal_017_018 - Verify "My Preferred Clinic" Information and Verify Remove Preferred Clinic
TC_Pet_Portal_005 - Verify "Order Rx & Food Online" is shown for Vetcove-linked clinics and redirects to Vetcove when clicked
TC_WhiskerDocs_007 - Verify the user is directed to the WD landing page If the selected pet has no active membership
